01881|           // For ERC-20 tokens, we need to decode the data field or use the price
01882|           let rawAmount = inTx.data?.value || '0'
01883|           
01884|           console.log('Input transaction:', {
01885|             rawAmount,
01886|             dataLength: inTx.data?.data?.length,
01887|             fromCurrency: fromCurrency?.symbol,
01888|             originChain: originChain?.currency?.symbol,
01889|             price: req.data.price
01890|           })
01891|           
01892|           // Use fetched currency data if available, otherwise fall back to chain native currency
01893|           if (fromCurrency) {
01894|             fromDecimals = fromCurrency.decimals
01895|             fromSymbol = fromCurrency.symbol
01896|             fromTokenAddress = fromCurrency.address
01897|             fromTokenLogo = fromCurrency.metadata?.logoURI
01898|             
01899|             // If this is an ERC-20 token (has transaction data), try to decode the amount
01900|             // The data field contains the encoded function call
01901|             if (inTx.data?.data && inTx.data.data.length > 10 && rawAmount === '0') {
01902|               // For ERC-20 transfers/approvals, the amount is typically in the last 64 characters
01903|               // This is a simplified approach - in production you'd want proper ABI decoding
01904|               try {
01905|                 const data = inTx.data.data
01906|                 // Check if it's a transfer or approve function (0xa9059cbb or 0x095ea7b3)
01907|                 // Or any other function that might have an amount parameter
01908|                 if (data.startsWith('0xa9059cbb') || data.startsWith('0x095ea7b3') || data.length >= 138) {
01909|                   // Amount is typically the last 32 bytes (64 hex chars)
01910|                   const amountHex = '0x' + data.slice(-64)
01911|                   rawAmount = BigInt(amountHex).toString()
01912|                   console.log('Decoded ERC-20 amount from data:', rawAmount)
01913|                 }
01914|               } catch (e) {
01915|                 console.error('Error decoding ERC-20 amount:', e)
01916|               }
01917|             } else if (rawAmount === '0' && fromCurrency) {
01918|               // If we still have 0 and we know it's an ERC-20, there might be an issue
01919|               console.warn('ERC-20 token but amount is 0, data length:', inTx.data?.data?.length)
01920|             }
01921|           } else if (originChain) {
01922|             fromDecimals = originChain.currency.decimals
01923|             fromSymbol = originChain.currency.symbol
01924|             fromTokenAddress = originChain.currency.address
01925|           }
01926|           
01927|           console.log('From token info:', { fromSymbol, fromDecimals, fromTokenAddress, rawAmount })
01928|           
01929|           if (rawAmount && rawAmount !== '0') {
01930|             try {
01931|               fromAmount = parseFloat(formatUnits(BigInt(rawAmount), fromDecimals)).toFixed(6)
01932|               console.log('Formatted from amount:', fromAmount)
01933|             } catch (e) {
01934|               console.error('Error formatting from amount:', e, rawAmount)
01935|               fromAmount = '0'
01936|             }
01937|           } else {
01938|             console.log('Raw amount is zero or missing')
01939|           }
01940|         }
01941|         
01942|         // Process output transaction
01943|         if (req.data.outTxs?.[0]) {

01945|           let rawAmount = outTx.data?.value || '0'
01946|
